name: suggest-roadmap-utility
description: Suggest using roadmap_ops.py instead of ad-hoc grep/awk/sed commands for roadmap operations

hooks.message:
Consider using the standardized roadmap utility instead of ad-hoc commands:

```bash
# Find a feature
python3 ~/.claude/plugins/local/shared-utilities/scripts/roadmap_ops.py find-feature ./roadmap.md <feature-id>

# Update a checkbox
python3 ~/.claude/plugins/local/shared-utilities/scripts/roadmap_ops.py update-checkbox ./roadmap.md "<task text>" done

# Calculate progress
python3 ~/.claude/plugins/local/shared-utilities/scripts/roadmap_ops.py calculate-progress ./roadmap.md
```

This ensures consistent parsing and easier maintenance.
